canonical_definition: A time series benchmark dataset used in long-term forecasting evaluations, part of the Electricity Transformer Temperature datasets with hourly and minute-level sampling.
papers: TEMPO: Prompt-based Generative Pre-trained Transformer for Time Series Forecasting
Time-LLM: Time Series Forecasting by Reprogramming Large Language Models
